title: feat: add xAI official image and video models
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Grok joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've officially wired up xAI's Grok models for image and video generation. Time to see what the new kid on the block can render.
gist.summary: Added official integration for xAI's Grok image and video generation models, including grok-imagine, grok-imagine-pro, and grok-video-pro.
gist.impact: Users on paid tiers can now generate high-quality images and videos using xAI's official models with full aspect ratio support.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot setting up a new glowing 'X' shaped server box in the digital garden to receive new signals, representing the addition of xAI models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot setting up a glowing 'X' shaped retro server box in a digital garden. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots nearby. The robot's screen shows a playing video. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot setting up a glowing 'X' shaped retro server box in a digital garden.
